equation_progression.latex: First-millennium written forms include: 20; d20; dUTU-KAM; dUTU-Å¡i; dUTU-Å¡u2; dÅ¡a2-maÅ¡; dÅ¡a3-maÅ¡2; dÅ¡a2-maÅ¡; Å¡u-Å¡a2-na-ku. Normalised forms include: Å amaÅ¡, Å amÅ¡i, Å amÅ¡u Utu in Online Corpora

• **Formal Statement:** The Hamiltonian density \(\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{T}}\) for a field \(\phi\) on \(M\) is given by \(\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{T}}=\pi\,\dot{\phi}-\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{T}}\), where \(\pi=\frac{\partial \mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{T}}}{\partial \dot{\phi}}\) is the canonical momentum and \(\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{T}}\) includes contributions from the degenerate metric and the TZP potential.
Beltz, Jonathan, "Namtar: Deity, Demon, Agent of Fate" (2023). Yale Graduate School of Arts and Sciences Dissertations . 944. https://elischolar.library.yale.edu/gsas_dissertations/944

dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The displayed relation permits the entry to be read as a concrete source-grounded step rather than a registry shell. Its support equations, including \lvert \Psi_{\mathrm{meta}} \rangle = \sum_{i=1}^{3\times 10^{9}} \lvert \mathrm{DNA}_{i} \rangle \otimes \lvert \mathrm{DAAN}(i \bmod 153600) \rangle \otimes \lvert \mathrm{Kissing}(\lfloor i / 153600 \rfloor) \rangle; • **Formal Statement:** The Hamiltonian density \(\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{T}}\) for a field \(\phi\) on \(M\) is given by \(\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{T}}=\pi\,\dot{\phi}-\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{T}}\), where \(\pi=\frac{\partial \mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{T}}}{\partial \dot{\phi}}\) is the canonical momentum and \(\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{T}}\) includes contributions from the degenerate metric and the TZP potential.; \pi_{\text{address}}(a, b) = \frac{1}{2}(a+b)(a+b+1) + b \pmod{153,600}, supply the immediate algebraic neighborhood for derivation and review.
